occurrence_sentence: PASQAL, CACIB AND MULTIVERSE COMPUTING CLOSE THE GAP TO BUSINESS RELEVANT QUANTUM ADVANTAGE.

interaction_phrase: the Nobel Prize of Physics received last year by Alain Aspect
occurrence_sentence: This strategy strengthens today our international visibility in quantum technologies that also benefits from the Nobel Prize of Physics received last year by Alain Aspect.

interaction_phrase: the excellence of its scientific research, recently put into the spotlight by Alain Aspect's Nobel Prize
occurrence_sentence: France can rely on its existing strengths in this domain, such as the excellence of its scientific research, recently put into the spotlight by Alain Aspect's Nobel Prize.

interaction_phrase: supported by France 2030 plan
occurrence_sentence: The french quantum strategy established in 2021, and supported by France 2030 plan provides a roadmap for the government to coordinate and accelerate research and development in quantum science and technology.

interaction_phrase: to the french quantum ecosystem
occurrence_sentence: Based on these promising results, our ambition is to continue and accelerate the support of France 2030 plan, to the french quantum ecosystem.

interaction_phrase: Présidente du Comité de surveillance des investissements d'avenir
occurrence_sentence: Patricia Barbizet Présidente du Comité de surveillance des investissements d'avenir (CSIA)

interaction_phrase: the scientific excellence of our country
occurrence_sentence: This strategy aims for the mastery of quantum technologies and can count on the scientific excellence of our country in this field.

interaction_phrase: the President of the Republic
occurrence_sentence: In January 2021, the President of the Republic presented the French strategy on quantum technologies.

occurrence_sentence: Catherine Lambert Head of the scientific comity of the French national quantum strategy

interaction_phrase: the three of us
occurrence_sentence: Beginning in 1972, the three of us successively developed realizations of such an experiment, with increasing sophistication.

interaction_phrase: acquired two 100 qubit cold-atom quantum simulators from Pasqal
occurrence_sentence: After the completion of a purchasing procedure called PPI (Public Procurement of Innovative Solutions), GENCI and Jülich Forschungszentrum (FZJ, Germany) acquired two 100 qubit cold-atom quantum simulators from Pasqal.

interaction_phrase: remote access to a Pasqal 100-qubit device
occurrence_sentence: HQI-related research projects will benefit from a remote access to a Pasqal 100-qubit device from April 2023, until they can access the device hosted at TGCC.

interaction_phrase: the purchasing agreement for the quantum simulator between GENCI and Pasqal
occurrence_sentence: The booth also hosted the signature of the purchasing agreement for the quantum simulator between GENCI and Pasqal, witnessed by SGPI and DGRI on June 17th.

interaction_phrase: supported the creation of start-up Siquance by entering into its capital
occurrence_sentence: Furthermore, CEA and CNRS supported the creation of start-up Siquance by entering into its capital in November 2022.

interaction_phrase: Pasqal, which raised 100 million Euros
occurrence_sentence: The projects supported by CNRS-Innovation have also performed well in terms of fundraising, with several projects raising substantial amounts, such as Alice & Bob, which raised 27 million Euros; Qubit Pharmaceuticals, which raised 16 million Euros; Aqemia, which raised 30 million Euros; Pasqal, which raised 100 million Euros, and Welinq, which recently raised 5 million Euros.

interaction_phrase: the most important in europe ever in quantum technologies
occurrence_sentence: This latest round of funding, which is the most important in europe ever in quantum technologies, includes participation from other new investors, including the European Innovation Council (EIC) Fund, Wa'ed Ventures, and Bpifrance, through its Large Venture Fund, as well as continuing investors Quantonation, the Defense Innovation Fund, Daphni, and Eni Next.

interaction_phrase: Nobel Prize-winning research of company co-founder Alain Aspect
occurrence_sentence: PASQAL's technology is built upon the Nobel Prize-winning research of company co-founder Alain Aspect.

interaction_phrase: founded by the French Atomic Energy Commission (CEA) and the National Centre for Scientific Research (CNRS)
occurrence_sentence: Siquance, a start-up founded by the French Atomic Energy Commission (CEA) and the National Centre for Scientific Research (CNRS), was launched on November 29, 2022, in Grenoble.

interaction_phrase: two European quantum computing leaders, Pasqal and Multiverse Computing
occurrence_sentence: Crédit Agricole CIB and two European quantum computing leaders, Pasqal and Multiverse Computing, have announced conclusive results from two proof of concept (PoC) experiments using quantum computing in finance.

interaction_phrase: a team of experts, including Hervé Arribart, Alain Aspect, Alexia Auffèves, Éric-Marc Mahé, Olivier Ezratty, Jean-Pierre Grandjean, and Philippe Grangier
occurrence_sentence: The commission had a team of experts, including Hervé Arribart, Alain Aspect, Alexia Auffèves, Éric-Marc Mahé, Olivier Ezratty, Jean-Pierre Grandjean, and Philippe Grangier, who worked together to identify and promote French equivalents of the technical terms related to quantum computing.

interaction_phrase: supported by France National Quantum Strategy, HQI-GENCI, Pasqal
occurrence_sentence: This international initiative is supported by France National Quantum Strategy, HQI-GENCI, Pasqal, Quandela, Alice&Bob, Siquance, Atos, Le Lab Quantique, Quantonation as well as by CSC (Finland), aQuantum (Spain), Qilimanjaro (Spain), IQM (Finland), ParityQC (Austria), Kipu Quantum (Germany) and Qnami (Switzerland).

interaction_phrase: supported by France National Quantum Strategy, HQI-GENCI, Pasqal, Siquance
occurrence_sentence: This international initiative is supported by France National Quantum Strategy, HQI-GENCI, Pasqal, Quandela, Alice&Bob, Siquance, Atos, Le Lab Quantique, Quantonation as well as by CSC (Finland), aQuantum (Spain), Qilimanjaro (Spain), IQM (Finland), ParityQC (Austria), Kipu Quantum (Germany) and Qnami (Switzerland).

interaction_phrase: the French Secretary General for Investments
occurrence_sentence: To meet the challenge of European strategic autonomy in this technology area and create the basis for future European leaders in quantum, Bruno Bonnel, the French Secretary General for Investments, Ina Schieferdecker, the German Director General for Research for Technological Sovereignty and Innovation, and Guido Biessen, Dutch Acting Director-General for Enterprises and Innovation, signed on November the 17th 2022, a Joint Statement On Cooperation in Quantum Technologies.

interaction_phrase: the French national quantum strategy
occurrence_sentence: Through the signing of the joint statement between Germany, the Netherlands and France, three global leading countries in quantum technologies, we wish to consolidate our trilateral cooperation in academic research and accelerate private synergies that will lay the foundations for European quantum unicorns, especially in universal quantum computers.

interaction_phrase: signed for France
occurrence_sentence: Dr. Sylvie Retailleau, Minister for Higher Education and Research, signed for France.

interaction_phrase: highlighted the importance of international collaboration
occurrence_sentence: Dr. Charles Tahan and Dr. Neil Abroug highlighted the importance of international collaboration and discussed plans for a joint workshop to bring together quantum researchers from both countries.
